title: We map the problem
description: PLACEHOLDER — We start by understanding what's actually broken or missing — not the solution you think you want, but the problem underneath it.

title: We design the shape
description: PLACEHOLDER — We translate the problem into a concrete plan: what gets built, in what order, and how it fits your existing systems.

title: We build it for real
description: PLACEHOLDER — Engineering starts, with working software visible early and often — not a black box until launch day.

title: We ship and stay on
description: PLACEHOLDER — Launch is the start, not the end — we support, measure, and improve what we built alongside you.
